'''zomavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wrestable|wrestable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wrestable|wrestable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zomavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomavithi|zomavithi]] || [[word:zomaviji|zomaviji]] || [[word:zomavishi|zomavishi]] || [[word:zomaviki|zomaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomavuthuthu|zomavuthuthu]] || [[word:zomavujuju|zomavujuju]] || [[word:zomavushushu|zomavushushu]] || [[word:zomavukuku|zomavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomavuthu|zomavuthu]] || [[word:zomavuju|zomavuju]] || [[word:zomavushu|zomavushu]] || [[word:zomavuku|zomavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomavufthuf|zomavufthuf]] || [[word:zomavufjuf|zomavufjuf]] || [[word:zomavufshuf|zomavufshuf]] || [[word:zomavufkuf|zomavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomavethe|zomavethe]] || [[word:zomaveje|zomaveje]] || [[word:zomaveshe|zomaveshe]] || [[word:zomaveke|zomaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomavothotho|zomavothotho]] || [[word:zomavojojo|zomavojojo]] || [[word:zomavoshosho|zomavoshosho]] || [[word:zomavokoko|zomavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomavotho|zomavotho]] || [[word:zomavojo|zomavojo]] || [[word:zomavosho|zomavosho]] || [[word:zomavoko|zomavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomavofthof|zomavofthof]] || [[word:zomavofjof|zomavofjof]] || [[word:zomavofshof|zomavofshof]] || [[word:zomavofkof|zomavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfthÃŸf|zomavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfjÃŸf|zomavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfshÃŸf|zomavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfkÃŸf|zomavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|zomavÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|zomavÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|zomavÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|zomavÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfthÃŸf|zomavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfjÃŸf|zomavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfshÃŸf|zomavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfkÃŸf|zomavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfthÃŸf|zomavÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfjÃŸf|zomavÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfshÃŸf|zomavÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:zomavÃŸfkÃŸf|zomavÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zomavÃḊthÃḊ|zomavÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:zomavÃḊjÃḊ|zomavÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:zomavÃḊshÃḊ|zomavÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:zomavÃḊkÃḊ|zomavÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zomavathatha|zomavathatha]] || [[word:zomavajaja|zomavajaja]] || [[word:zomavashasha|zomavashasha]] || [[word:zomavakaka|zomavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zomavatha|zomavatha]] || [[word:zomavaja|zomavaja]] || [[word:zomavasha|zomavasha]] || [[word:zomavaka|zomavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zomavafthaf|zomavafthaf]] || [[word:zomavafjaf|zomavafjaf]] || [[word:zomavafshaf|zomavafshaf]] || [[word:zomavafkaf|zomavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zomavasha|zomavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zomavshÃḋsha|zomavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zomavrosha|zomavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zomavmusha|zomavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zomavyasha|zomavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozomavnkshÃḋsha|gozomavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozomavnkrosha|gozomavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozomavnkmusha|gozomavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozomavnkyasha|gozomavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zomamavasha|zomamavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zomamavshÃḋsha|zomamavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zomamavrosha|zomamavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zomamavmusha|zomamavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zomamavyasha|zomamavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozomamavnkshÃḋsha|gozomamavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozomamavnkrosha|gozomamavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozomamavnkmusha|gozomamavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozomamavnkyasha|gozomamavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zemÃḊvasha|zemÃḊvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zemÃḊvshÃḋsha|zemÃḊvshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zemÃḊvrosha|zemÃḊvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zemÃḊvmusha|zemÃḊvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zemÃḊvyasha|zemÃḊvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozemÃḊvnkshÃḋsha|gozemÃḊvnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozemÃḊvnkrosha|gozemÃḊvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozemÃḊvnkmusha|gozemÃḊvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozemÃḊvnkyasha|gozemÃḊvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zomfavasha|zomfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zomfavshÃḋsha|zomfavshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zomfavrosha|zomfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zomfavmusha|zomfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zomfavyasha|zomfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozomfavnkshÃḋsha|gozomfavnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozomfavnkrosha|gozomfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozomfavnkmusha|gozomfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozomfavnkyasha|gozomfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
